signals.headline: US-Iran 2-week ceasefire holding amid Hormuz blockade and failed talks | NO | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
US-Iran 2-week ceasefire holding amid Hormuz blockade and failed talks | NO | MED confidence**

signals.headline: South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2.2% in March 2026 | YES | HIGH confidence**  
This figure, released by Statistics Korea and reported today, marks an increase from 2.0% in January and February 2026 but fell short of market forecasts of 2.4%, signaling contained price pressures amid global energy volatility from the Iran conflict.[1]
